description: Style NoteThis lotto shoe is great for an evening coffee date or a neighbourhood game of cricket! Stylish and feature-packed, this shoe is a great buy not only because it's styled so well, but also because of the quality of materials used.Product DetailsNavy blue shoe with central lace-ups, overlaysMeshed and padded tongue and innerThick rubber midsolePunto flex grooves and suction point on the outsoleMaterial and CareSynthetic Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
